title: Working Paper
description: Output schema for a structured, report-ready working paper generated from meeting transcripts, slide intelligence, and gap analysis.

executive_summary.description: 5–8 sentence summary covering what was studied, key tensions, main findings, and at least one unresolved issue.

purpose_and_scope.description: Narrative describing the purpose of the paper, the band ranges under analysis, and whether the focus is in-band, adjacent-band, or both.

system_description.description: Summary of federal and non-federal systems discussed, drawn from transcript entities and slide content.

technical_analysis.description: Technical analysis narrative organized into assumptions, methods, and limitations. May include gap-augmented subsections.

key_findings.description: Atomic bullet findings derived from decisions and strong technical claims.

risks_and_uncertainties.description: Risks derived from transcript open questions and gap analysis, including model uncertainty, deployment assumptions, and coordination challenges.

decisions_and_recommendations.description: Normalized recommendations derived from decisions_made and action items in the transcript. Implied recommendations added when none are present.

open_questions_for_agencies.description: Calibrated, open-ended questions for agency follow-up. Minimum 5 questions required. Covers validation, missing data, conflicting claims, and implementation feasibility.

appendix.description: Traceability and alignment metadata required for FCC/NTIA defensibility.

source_traceability.description: Traceability records linking each claim to its source artifact and confidence score.

slide_alignment_summary.description: Summary of slide claims aligned to working paper sections.

discussion_gaps.description: Conflicts or discrepancies identified between slide content and meeting discussion.

claim.description: The claim or finding being traced.

confidence.description: Confidence score in [0, 1] for the claim.

section.description: Working paper section the claim maps to.
